identity.title: Whistle on the River
identity.styleSentence: A gritty 94 BPM boom bap track blending dirty dockside crime narratives with a sinister 1920s cartoon aesthetic, featuring dusty drums, upright bass stabs, vinyl hiss, and raspy aggressive male vocals over a dark piano loop.

lyrics.text:
Yo, black and white night on the river.
You hear that whistle?
That ain't a warning.
That's a problem.
Whistle on the river, smoke in the sky.
Boat full of trouble when the bad boys ride.
Hands on the wheel, eyes gone cold.
Black and white world, but the money still gold.
Whistle on the river, fog on the dock.
Cartoon gloves, but the hammer don't stop.
Old school grin with a gangsta lean.
Steam in the pipes and the whole boat mean.
I came through squeaking with the boots on deck.
Little gloves on, but I still collect.
Captain of the chaos, grin too wide.
Steamboat sliding through the low tide.
Pocket full of pens, hat tilted low.
Whistle hit sharp when the crowd.
Go and blow.
Rat-tat rhythm on the wooden floor.
Kick in the hatch, make the engine roar.
Oh, real flicker.
Everybody freeze.
Smoke stack, coughing like it got bad dreams.
River racks scatter when the shadows get deep.
In the moonlight,
dancers wear the secret sleeve.
Hey, yo!
Steam up!
Gloves on!
Lights out!
I'm on the dock with the rope and the crate.
Black ink dripping off the one it played.
No color in the world.
But the mood pitch dark.
Be the one playing with the criminal spark.
Fog on base when the deal goes down.
Everybody quiet when the boat come around.
Heard three knocks and the whistle cried.
Now the whole pier know who runs that tide.
Rubber hose bounce, but the bar's concrete.
Tap dance rhythm with the steel toe feet.
Running at the moon like I know too much.
Turn that crank and the whole beat crush.
You thought it was funny?
You thought it was cute?
No.
Uh,
that whistle means move.
Whistle on the river.
Smoke in the sky.
Boat full of trouble when the bad boys ride.
Hands on the wheel.
Eyes gone cold.
Black and white world, but the money still gold.
Whistle on the river.
Fog on the dock.
Cartoon gloves, but the hammer don't stop.
Old school grin with the gangster lean.
Steam in the pipes and the whole boat mean.
Weep, weep, weep, weep, weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep.
Weep, weep, weep, weep, weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep.
Weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep,
weep.
Round ears and the shadow.
White gloves on the crank.
Laugh like a cartoon.
Move like a bank.
Ink in my veins.
Steam in my chest.
River full of ghosts.
I don't lose I collect.
Boat go left when the lor go right.
Smoke stack black in the pale moonlight.
Whistle hit once and the dock gets nervous.
Old little tune with a brand new purpose.
Spin that wheel till the whole world shakes.
Let the riverboat boss.
with the rubber hose legs black and white frame
but the threats stay vivid steamboat willy with
the whole gear with it whistle on the river smoke
in the sky bullocks rubber when the bad boys ride
hands on the wheel eyes gone cold black and white
world but the money still cold whistle on the
river fog on the dock cartoon glove but the hammer
don't stop old school grin with the gangster lean
steam in the pipes in the hobo mean
that ain't a cartoon that's the river talking

analysis.summary: A gritty gangsta rap narrative blending noir atmosphere with chaotic rubber-hose cartoon aesthetics to depict a dangerous riverboat crime story where playful visuals mask lethal threats.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Mysterious, ominous anticipation of a crime story beginning.
sections.imageryPrompt: Black and white grainy film stock with fog rolling over dark wooden docks at night, faint silhouette of an old steamboat whistle cutting through the smoke.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Playful yet menacing introduction to characters on a dangerous boat.
sections.imageryPrompt: Rubber-hose animation style hands gripping a ship's wheel in high contrast black and white, steam rising from pipes like ghostly fingers against a dark river background.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Final crescendo of industrial noise and criminal threat.
sections.imageryPrompt: Monochromatic scene where a riverboat engine roars like a living beast, gangster figures in white gloves standing amidst steam that forms screaming faces.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Aggressive realization that the cartoon facade is deadly real.
sections.imageryPrompt: Concrete pier meeting bouncing rubber hose legs, a steel-toed boot crushing tap dance rhythms, dark shadows looming over white gloved hands turning crank wheels.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A rusty metal ship whistle emitting a sound wave that distorts reality into jagged cartoon lines against black smoke.
Thick rolling fog from steamboat stacks obscuring faces, swirling in grayscale like ink spilled on water with a hint of red danger deep inside the gray.
Large rubber-hose style white gloves hovering over a dark surface, fingers curled as if ready to strike or clutch something forbidden.
White vapor exploding from boiler pipes creating ghostly shapes that look like screaming mouths in a 1928 cartoon frame.
Black liquid dripping from a fountain pen onto dirty wooden planks, spreading rapidly to form shadowy fingerprints in the dust.
A large metal ship wheel being turned by white-gloved hands causing chains to clank rhythmically under dim electric light.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)

full show: merge analysis+interactions into tracks.planet; lyrics_synced from transcript words
